description: Host your Raptoreum Smartnode on the Flux Network (HA: 2 redundant nodes with automatic failover). Collateral: 1,800,000 RTM.
name: RaptoreumSN

userEnvironmentParameters.name: KEY
userEnvironmentParameters.placeholder: Enter your operator BLS private key

userEnvironmentParameters.name: PROTXHASH
userEnvironmentParameters.description: Optional. Your smartnode registration hash (proTxHash). Enables automatic on-chain IP updates (HA failover) so the node is never PoSe-banned after a relocation.
